code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  mut total = 0
  mut cur = 0
  mut have = false
  mut done = false
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i <= n
    let b = if i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        32
      end
    else
      32
    end
    let is_digit = b >= 48 and b <= 57
    if is_digit
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      have = true
    else
      if have and not done
        if total + cur > 100
          done = true
        else
          total = total + cur
        end
      end
      cur = 0
      have = false
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("total=#{total}")
end
